full_text:
Zhao Qian (Yanxin) 趙謙 (彦信)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Qian (趙謙), styledYanxin (彦信), was born in Shu. Struggled against the Turbans but stopped Liu Yan’s invasion. Organised move of capital. Zhao Qian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Dong Zhuo, and Li Jue. Zhao Qian lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
